prompt: Style the 'Mark as resolved' header chip to match Dash purple brand
expected_avoid: raw AlignUI color override that bypasses tokens
shadcn variant API (Dash uses tone × style)
expected_use: Tailwind semantic class bg-primary / text-primary via @dash/base-theme
AlignUI token consumption if surrounding chips already use AlignUI tokens (consistency within pane)
expected_pattern_ref: Token usage (rules L192-227); Brand token (rules L218-219); Tag vs Badge naming (rules L144); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Hardcode hex color' (rules L335); Badge appearance prop (rules L182-189)
context_notes: halo uses AlignUI vendored locally; the @dash registry tokens are compatible (the DS targets Tailwind-variants 0.2.1 which is halo's pinned version). Badge in Dash uses `appearance` prop NOT `style` (renamed Batch 13). Canonical Dash Purple = `#5e2aac` (matches DS token `--dash-purple-500`); always reach for the token, never the literal.
